package.config.title: ClawDrive
package.config.gateway.tls: Use TLS when connecting to the Gateway.
package.config.autoConnect: Automatically connect to the Gateway on startup.
package.config.displayName: Display name advertised by the extension.
package.config.provider.policyLevel: Controls provider runtime isolation. safe uses an isolated task home, extended derives and sanitizes one from your local Codex home, and raw reuses the source CODEX_HOME directly.
package.config.provider.disableFeatures: Codex startup features to force off for task runs. Clear this list to stop disabling startup features experimentally.
package.config.provider.sandboxMode: Controls the sandbox policy for provider shell commands. read-only is default; workspace-write allows workspace changes; danger-full-access removes sandboxing.
